title: MIA vs WDA: Which Licence Do You Need?
alt: Side-by-side comparison of MHRA MIA and WDA(H) licence scope and requirements

left.heading: MIA
points: Import of product from outside the UK
Requires a Qualified Person (QP); built on GMP

right.heading: WDA(H)
points: Wholesale supply to pharmacies, hospitals, dealers
Storage and onward distribution of released product
Export of medicines to other markets
Brokering and procurement with physical possession
Requires a Responsible Person (RP/RPi); built on GDP
